objective: Create the versioned contract catalog and EventEnvelope v1 vertical slice with deterministic Python and TypeScript models, runtime boundary validation, and cross-language compatibility tests.
non_goals: Do not implement the control-plane server, WebSocket transport, durable journal, supervisor, resource scheduler, observability backend, or product conversation behavior in this slice.
Do not copy upstream production source or add model weights, datasets, voices, avatar assets, game adapters, or livestream integrations.
Do not silently accept unknown event types, unknown top-level fields, oversized JSON payloads, inline base64 media, or invalid identifiers.
contracts: JSON Schema draft 2020-12 is the wire-contract source of truth.
EventEnvelope v1 is strict, versioned, bounded, Unicode-safe, and rejects unknown event types.
Binary media is referenced by metadata and transport correlation; it is never embedded as base64 in JSON.
Generated Python and TypeScript models are deterministic projections of the reviewed catalog.
allowed_dependencies: Python jsonschema >=4.25,<5 as the Python runtime JSON Schema validator.
Ajv 8.17.x as the TypeScript runtime JSON Schema validator.
TypeScript 5.x as a build-only dependency for the generated TypeScript projection.
oss_candidates: CloudEvents specification for envelope semantics research; do not claim conformance without tests.
No upstream production source is approved for copying in M01-S1.
acceptance_criteria: Every catalog schema validates against JSON Schema draft 2020-12 and every process-boundary fixture is runtime validated.
Missing fields, wrong types, unknown event types, unknown top-level fields, oversized JSON, malformed identifiers, and inline base64 media fail closed.
Vietnamese and mixed Unicode payloads round-trip without data loss between Python and TypeScript.
Generated Python and TypeScript models are deterministic and a check command fails on drift.
Golden v1 fixtures pass in both runtimes and the compatibility policy for future n-1 fixtures is documented.
The M01-S1 deterministic test suite passes 20 consecutive times on a frozen commit.
required_test_commands: uv run --frozen python -m unittest discover -s tests/contracts -p test_*.py
